# MuleSoft Salesforce OMS

> LLM-friendly index for the latest version (1.1) of Salesforce OMS documentation.
> See [Salesforce OMS llms-full.txt](https://docs.mulesoft.com/salesforce-oms/llms-full.txt) for all the Salesforce OMS documentation in one file.

## Content

- [Anypoint Partner Manager Setup Guide](https://docs.mulesoft.com/salesforce-oms/latest/anypoint-partner-manager-setup-guide.md)
- [Anypoint MQ Setup Guide](https://docs.mulesoft.com/salesforce-oms/latest/anypointmq-setup-guide.md)
- [MuleSoft Accelerator for Salesforce OMS](https://docs.mulesoft.com/salesforce-oms/latest/index.md)
- [SAP S/4HANA Order Management Guide](https://docs.mulesoft.com/salesforce-oms/latest/order-mgmt-guide.md)
- [Prerequisites for MuleSoft Accelerator for OMS](https://docs.mulesoft.com/salesforce-oms/latest/prerequisites.md)
- [SAP S4HANA Setup Guide](https://docs.mulesoft.com/salesforce-oms/latest/sap-s4hana-setup-guide.md)
- [Salesforce OMS Setup and Customization Guide](https://docs.mulesoft.com/salesforce-oms/latest/sfdc-oms-setup-customization-guide.md)
